notes: Full building stock is not bundled because the source CSV is large.

interventionLibrary.source_note: Shanghai public-building monitoring practice; low-cost control and behavior measure.

interventionLibrary.strategy_name: Building automation system and sub-metering retrofit
interventionLibrary.source_note: BAS/BMS retrofit and energy-monitoring platform ranges from Shanghai and China public-building cases.
GB/T 25261-2018 reflective coating; Shanghai needs explicit winter heating penalty.
Roof insulation ranges from Chinese hot-summer cold-winter retrofit guidance and market cost references.
Shanghai wall-insulation practice and DG/TJ08-2126-2023; high-rise feasibility must be checked.
Low-E glazing cost and performance from Chinese market and retrofit references.

interventionLibrary.strategy_name: External shading, louvers or window film
interventionLibrary.source_note: Window shading and solar-control references; best for cooling-sensitive units.

interventionLibrary.strategy_name: HVAC COP upgrade: VRF, inverter chiller or ASHP
interventionLibrary.source_note: VRF, ASHP and inverter chiller retrofit ranges; applicable mainly to non-residential and pre-2015 stock.

interventionLibrary.strategy_name: LED lighting retrofit with occupancy sensors
interventionLibrary.source_note: LED retrofit case evidence; savings refer to whole-building proxy after lighting end-use conversion.
Shanghai rooftop PV yield and CPIA distributed PV cost references; model as electricity offset.
Shanghai ultra-low or near-zero-energy incremental package; should be handled as a separate deep-retrofit scenario.
